message:
chore(connectors/*): coordinated hardening + test refactor across all 42 connector crates

Sweeping pass across every connector implementation. The changes are
thematically consistent rather than feature work:

  * Test bodies migrated from `match { Variant => ..., other => panic!(...) }`
    to `assert!(matches!(...))` — significantly more concise and avoids the
    "unused variable" rustc warning chains in tests.
  * `connector.rs` files updated to expose new fields/methods that align
    with the corresponding `fcp-core` and `fcp-host` API changes (e.g.,
    `forbidden_zones`, capability bound/unbound state distinctions).
  * Several connectors gain real implementation behind previously stubbed
    methods (notably bitbucket, dockerhub, feishu, figma, github, gitlab,
    google-people, google-admin-reports, microsoft365, s3, shopify, telegram,
    twilio, twitter, youtube — the largest diffs).
  * Error taxonomy normalized — connector-specific error enums map cleanly
    onto the shared `FcpError` taxonomy, with `RateLimited` / `Unauthorized`
    / `ResourceNotFound` mappings unified.
  * Cargo.toml additions where new connectors needed extra deps (bitbucket,
    cloudflare, dockerhub, gitlab, google-admin-reports, google-people,
    imessage, irc, nextcloud-talk, nostr, shopify, sonos).
  * `manifest.toml` bumps for connectors whose declared capabilities/state
    model needed to match the in-code reality (anthropic, gmail, jira,
    microsoft365, s3, shopify, stripe, tlon, twilio, twitter).
  * Live verification tests (anthropic, gmail, openai, stripe, telegram)
    updated to keep pace with the new APIs.

Connectors touched (42): airtable, anthropic, apple-notes, apple-reminders,
aws, azure, bitbucket, circleci, cloudflare, confluence, dingtalk,
dockerhub, email-generic, feishu, figma, github, gitlab, gmail,
google-admin-reports, google-people, google-places, hue, imessage, irc,
jira, microsoft365, nextcloud-talk, nostr, openai, outlook,
perplexity-search, qq, s3, shopify, sonos, stripe, synology-chat, telegram,
tlon, twilio, twitter, youtube.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -51,8 +51,10 @@ idempotency = "none"
 revocation_freshness = "critical"
 
 [provides.operations."gmail.send_message".input_schema]
-required = ["to", "subject", "body"]
 type = "object"
+anyOf = [{ required = ["raw"] }, { required = ["to", "subject", "body"] }]
+[provides.operations."gmail.send_message".input_schema.properties.raw]
+type = "string"
 [provides.operations."gmail.send_message".input_schema.properties.to]
 type = "string"
 [provides.operations."gmail.send_message".input_schema.properties.subject]
@@ -377,7 +379,60 @@ max_response_bytes = 1048576
 when_to_use = "Retrieve a saved email draft."
 common_mistakes = []
 examples = ['{"draft_id": "r1234567890"}']
-related = ["gmail.send_draft"]
+related = ["gmail.create_draft", "gmail.send_draft"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft"]
+description = "Create a saved Gmail draft"
+capability = "gmail.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "none"
+revocation_freshness = "safe"
+
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+anyOf = [{ required = ["raw"] }, { required = ["to", "subject", "body"] }]
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".input_schema.properties.raw]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".input_schema.properties.to]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".input_schema.properties.subject]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".input_schema.properties.body]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".output_schema]
+required = ["draft"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".output_schema.properties.draft]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["gmail.googleapis.com", "www.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."gmail.create_draft".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Create a saved draft without sending it."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "This creates an unsent draft; use gmail.send_draft to send it later",
+    "Using standard base64 instead of base64url encoding for raw payloads",
+]
+examples = ['{"to": "user@example.com", "subject": "Draft", "body": "Message body"}']
+related = ["gmail.get_draft", "gmail.send_draft"]
 
 # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

         "gmail.trash_message" => "gmail.delete",
         _ => "gmail.read",
     };
